sub_agent_reviews.summary: Single Scout searched llm-agent, llm-post-training, and ai-safety together and returned 10 weekly candidates. Top recommendations were Q-Evolve and CHASE; Q-Evolve was selected because it is non-duplicate and covers both Agent and post-training.
Read the arXiv PDF and TeX source, extracting Algorithm 1, method formulas, result tables, ablations, limitations, and local figure assets.
Checked duplicate candidates against local public items and highlighted structured feedback, greedy rollout, and cross-iteration drift limits.
Wrote a 5000+ Chinese-character Markdown deep read with local figures, formulas, tables, Mermaid, and pseudocode.
